_comment: Copy this file to ~/.claude/methodology/mcp-connections.json and adjust paths. Cortex consumes these upstream MCP servers via ingest_codebase and ingest_prd.

codebase._comment: ai-automatised-pipeline — codebase analysis (tree-sitter + graph). Consumed by ingest_codebase.

prd-gen._comment: prd-spec-generator — PRD authoring + validation. Consumed by ingest_prd.
